task_completion.description: Agent views the CRM pipeline or opportunity list to check expected revenues.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the CRM pipeline or list view where opportunity expected revenues (e.g., $150,000, $95,000, $12,000) are visible.

task_completion.description: Agent navigates to the customer record for Logistics Pro Inc.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the customer detail page or edit form for 'Logistics Pro Inc'.

task_completion.description: Agent applies the 'Strategic Account' tag to Logistics Pro Inc.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the 'Strategic Account' tag added to the tags field on the Logistics Pro Inc customer record.

task_completion.description: Agent navigates to the customer record for NorthWest Retail.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the customer detail page or edit form for 'NorthWest Retail'.

task_completion.description: Agent applies the 'Strategic Account' tag to NorthWest Retail.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the 'Strategic Account' tag added to the tags field on the NorthWest Retail customer record.

task_completion.description: Agent ensures SmallTime LLC is not tagged as a Strategic Account.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the agent either ignoring SmallTime LLC or viewing its record without applying the 'Strategic Account' tag.

integrity.description: Agent used the CRM graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the web browser and CRM UI, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Tags were applied within the actual CRM application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Strategic Account' tag appears in the proper CRM tag input field, not in a text editor or unrelated application.

integrity.description: Agent did not use scripts to bypass manual UI interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing execution of Python, bash, or database scripts to update customer tags directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The threshold for a Strategic Account is $90,000 in expected revenue. There are three specific customers to evaluate: 1) 'Logistics Pro Inc' has an opportunity of $150,000 and MUST be tagged 'Strategic Account'. 2) 'NorthWest Retail' has an opportunity of $95,000 and MUST be tagged 'Strategic Account'. 3) 'SmallTime LLC' has an opportunity of $12,000 and MUST NOT be tagged.
